title: HELP4HEP - 211info
text: HELP-4-HEP HELP4HEP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides phone-based peer support to individuals diagnosed with or exposed to hepatitis C. Support includes: help finding resources such as free or low-cost testing and treatment; financial assistance for medical care; and general information on prevention, risk factors, and additional resources. Also provides information via website and app. 1351 Cooper Road Scotch Plains, NJ 07076 Eligibility: Anyone who has been exposed to or diagnosed with the hepatitis C virus and anyone who has questions about any aspect of hepatitis C Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm. Closed federal holidays. Email (877) 435-7443 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Helpline (877) 435-7443 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Hepatitis Talklines/Warmlines * Hepatitis If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELP-4-HEP
